description: A visually-hidden, focusable accessibility link that allows keyboard users to skip to the main content area.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Standard skip link targeting main content — visually hidden but focusable via keyboard

stories.name: CustomTarget
stories.description: Skip link targeting a custom section ID

notes: The link has classes 'visually-hidden focusable skip-link' — it is hidden until focused. The href always points to '#main-content' and label is always 'Skip to main content' across all sampled pages, but both are modelled as props with defaults for flexibility. The 'visually-hidden' and 'focusable' classes should be hardcoded on the element.
htmlExamples: Skip to main content
